title: KISS RETURN exits KISS mode; spec says stay permanently
description: python/src/lichen/interface/kiss/handler.py:172-177 (with 111-112). spec/kiss-framing.md §4.3 Return (15): 'LICHEN stays in KISS mode permanently... Accept these silently... but take no action.' _handle_return sets _exited = True, after which handle() silently drops ALL subsequent frames — the exact action the spec forbids. Pre-existing. Fix: accept and ignore RETURN (optionally invoke on_exit as notification only); keep processing frames.
